title: Dipholis montana

The classification of Dipholis montana is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Rosids, Order: Sapindales, Family: Sapindaceae, Genus: Dipholis, Species: D. montana.
